texto: Dr. Murray points to the Nazarite system as what he calls an external scaffolding supporting human efforts at righteousness, reminding the participant that he is set apart. Christ, he said, needed no external reminder that the Father was His joy and that wine was not, that He was Life and was wholly Other from death, that He bore on Himself the shame that long hair but vaguely pointed to.
explicacao: Citação de David Murray sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Dr. Murray points to the Nazarite system as what he calls an external scaffolding supporting huma…” articula reflexao, nazarite, religion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e religion.
